news.title: University awards recognize Notre Dame faculty excellence
news.summary_en: Gina Shropshire, associate advising professor, received the Dockweiler award in recognition of her service as an undergraduate academic advisor

news.title: Undergraduate Student Perspective: Allison Elshoff ’26
news.summary_en: For many, a great GPA and a degree in Business Analytics are markers of academic success. For Class of 2026 Salutatorian Allison Elshoff, they are also tools for transformation. A […]
